he will be disease-ridden, have loss of
finances, and get ill fame. He will renovate his old place at the age of 56-57,
migrate to a new place and start life afresh. Two of his sons will earn plenty
of money. He may wear the Sanyasi clothes and live upto 70-72. His family
life will be unhappy as Mars meets the Moon and Rahu in his transits.
CHART 39
In this chart Mercury and the Sun are in Pisces. The native will be an
intellectual and he will have good education-Venus in Aquarius with the
Sun and Mercury in the next house indicates that the native will hold high
places in Government. Further, Venus and Saturn have exchanged places. So
